description: Memoization audit report for inspector detail panes. Documents which components have memoization and which need it based on payload size analysis against fixtures.

entries.dataDescription: Full DeviceDetail payload including protocols array, associated detections, associated alerts
entries.recommendation: Current fixture has 5 protocols. No memoization concern at this size. Add React.memo if protocol count exceeds 20.

entries.dataDescription: Protocol array passed to donut chart for visual breakdown
entries.recommendation: Chart recalculates on every render. Add useMemo for arc computation when protocol count exceeds 20.

entries.dataDescription: Individual detection row in associated detections list
entries.recommendation: Single detection in fixture. Add React.memo when list exceeds 50 items.

entries.dataDescription: Individual alert row in associated alerts list
entries.recommendation: Single alert in fixture. Add React.memo when list exceeds 30 items.

entries.dataDescription: Full DetectionDetail payload including related devices, related alerts, notes, timeline
entries.recommendation: Current fixture has modest payload. No memoization concern at this size.

entries.dataDescription: Individual device row in related devices list
entries.recommendation: Two devices in fixture. Add React.memo when list exceeds 20 items.

entries.dataDescription: Full AlertDetail payload including trigger history, associated devices, associated detections
entries.recommendation: Current fixture has modest payload. No memoization concern at this size.
Three triggers in fixture. Add React.memo when list exceeds 30 items.

entries.dataDescription: BFF fetch result stored in useState. useCallback memoizes fetch function by deviceId.
entries.recommendation: useCallback correctly memoizes fetch by deviceId. No additional memoization needed for the hook itself.

entries.dataDescription: BFF fetch result stored in useState. useCallback memoizes fetch function by detectionId.
entries.recommendation: useCallback correctly memoizes fetch by detectionId. No additional memoization needed for the hook itself.

entries.dataDescription: BFF fetch result stored in useState. useCallback memoizes fetch function by alertId.
entries.recommendation: useCallback correctly memoizes fetch by alertId. No additional memoization needed for the hook itself.

entries.dataDescription: History array and selection from InspectorContext
entries.recommendation: History capped at INSPECTOR_HISTORY_MAX_DEPTH (10). No memoization concern.
